meaning: vt.慢煮vi.煨,炖,内部混乱状态n.将沸腾的状态,将沸腾的温度
examples: Bring the soup to the boil , then allow it to simmer for five minutes.
The water had barely come to a simmer when she cracked four eggs into it.
To reconstitute dried tomatoes, simmer in plain water until they are tender.
Reduce the heat to medium low and simmer gently for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the salt and simmer for 60 minutes or until the broth lightly thickens.
